summary: Crystal‑clear soundboard capture of a historic show with first‑time Terrapin and Estimated Prophet, plus killer second‑set jams.
review: The recording is an upgraded Betty soundboard (SBD) that sounds crystal clear despite a few patched sections and missing drum tracks. Musically the concert is a fan favorite – first performances of Terrapin and Estimated Prophet, a monster Playing in the Band, all‑time‑great Help > Slipknot! > Franklin's, plus stellar Eyes of the World and Dancing jams.

ai_rating.rationale: Four detailed 5‑star reviews praise both performance (historic firsts, standout jams) and soundboard quality; one outlier gives a 0 rating but offers no criticism of the audio. Weighted average yields a strong rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Crystal‑clear SBD (Betty board) restored and upgraded; some tunings and sections are patched from other sources, drums missing in first set, occasional cuts (e.g., Franklin's, Around & Around). Overall very listenable.

standout_songs: Help on the Way > Slipknot! > Franklin's Tower
show_quality.setlist_flow: First set solid with historic premieres; second set A+ featuring deep jams and seamless segues despite a few patched gaps. Overall pacing is praised as one of the year’s best.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Starts his solo quietly, builds tension, then delivers one of the greatest TJ passages – strong Garcia work.
band_member_comments.Phil: Gets a ‘Phil bonus’ on Eyes of the World, taking lead in the ending jam.
band_member_comments.Keys: Keith plays a Polymoog on Estimated Prophet, noted as an unusual and praised texture.
band_member_comments.Drums: No drum track recorded for the first set; overall drums incomplete.
